summary: PR #2250 decompiled two Mute City stage functions in src/melee/gr/grmutecity.c and updated the grmutecity header prototype/include surface. The PR body claims ninja builds clean and fuzzy_match_percent 100.0 for all functions; the decomp bot report records new 100% matches for fn_801F2B58 and grMuteCity_801F2BBC plus .sbss improvement.

key_files.role: Replaced nonmatching markers for fn_801F2B58 and grMuteCity_801F2BBC with C implementations; expanded a static grMc_804D69D0 struct shape and added static s32 grMc_804D69D4.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/gr/grmutecity.c hunk around StageData/grMc_804D69D0 and functions at 1F2B58/1F2BBC

key_files.role: Updated fn_801F2B58 from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to a concrete prototype and added mp/forward.h for mpLib_GroundEnum.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grmutecity.h include and prototype hunk

what_changed: Decompiled fn_801F2B58 as a void function taking Ground*, s32, CollData*, s32, mpLib_GroundEnum, and f32; it checks grMc_804D69D4, CollData flags, mpLib_GroundEnum_Unk2, x0_gobj, p_link == 9, then sets cd->x34_flags.b7 = 1.
Decompiled grMuteCity_801F2BBC(enum_t arg0) to return DynamicsDesc pointers from grMc_804D69D0->x8 or ->xC for selected arg0 values when grMc_804D69D4 == 1, otherwise NULL.
Expanded the local static struct pointed to by grMc_804D69D0 with x4, x8, and xC fields, with x8/xC typed as DynamicsDesc*.
Added static s32 grMc_804D69D4 in grmutecity.c; bot report says .sbss became a new 100% match.
Updated grmutecity.h to expose the recovered fn_801F2B58 signature and include mp/forward.h.
smart_moves: Updated the owning header after recovering a concrete function signature instead of leaving fn_801F2B58 as UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS.
Used existing typed project structures and fields visible in the diff, including CollData, x34_flags bitfields, x0_gobj, and p_link, rather than raw pointer arithmetic for the collision checks.
Kept uncertain globals and struct members in address-style/generated names such as grMc_804D69D4 and x8/xC where the PR evidence does not establish semantic names.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a decompiled function body proves a public/local header signature, update the header prototype and necessary forward include in the same PR.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grmutecity.h changes fn_801F2B58 from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to concrete parameters and adds mp/forward.h

decomp_lessons.lesson: For collision/stage logic, prefer known typed fields and bitfields such as CollData->x34_flags and CollData->x0_gobj when they are available in the type system.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_801F2B58 uses cd->x34_flags.b1234, cd->x0_gobj, cd->x0_gobj->p_link, and cd->x34_flags.b7

decomp_lessons.lesson: Keep address-style or offset-style names when the match recovers layout but the PR evidence does not prove semantic meaning.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grMc_804D69D0 struct fields remain x4/x8/xC and grMc_804D69D4 remains address-style

naming_conventions.pattern: Stage globals in this slice retain grMc_address-style names, e.g. grMc_804D69D0 and grMc_804D69D4.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static struct pointer grMc_804D69D0 and static s32 grMc_804D69D4

naming_conventions.pattern: Unknown struct members are kept as offset-like xN names until semantics are proven, with recovered pointer types applied where known, e.g. DynamicsDesc* x8 and xC.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static struct adds void* x4, DynamicsDesc* x8, DynamicsDesc* xC

naming_conventions.pattern: The local callback/helper name fn_801F2B58 remains address-style despite the recovered signature, indicating no semantic rename was supported by this PR evidence.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: function remains named fn_801F2B58 in source and header

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use unsigned range checks to express adjacent accepted enum/flag values in a way that matches codegen, e.g. (u32)(b1234 - 2) > 1 and (u32)(arg0 - 0x32) <= 2.
Preserve repeated NULL guard shape when present in the matched function rather than simplifying it away; fn_801F2B58 checks cd->x0_gobj == NULL before and after the p_link check.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_801F2B58 has two cd->x0_gobj == NULL checks

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Recover small static data/layout needed by matched code alongside the function body; adding grMc_804D69D4 is corroborated by the bot report's .sbss new match.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Update owning headers when recovering signatures
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2250 is a compact example of replacing UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS with a concrete prototype in the owning header after decompiling the body, including adding the needed forward include for mpLib_GroundEnum.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grmutecity.h prototype and mp/forward.h changes

accepted_candidate_records.title: Unsigned range checks can encode adjacent constants cleanly
accepted_candidate_records.text: The matched Mute City functions use unsigned subtract-and-compare forms for compact range tests over adjacent flag/enum values, while leaving non-adjacent constants as explicit equality checks.

source_update_candidates.title: grmutecity stage file contains collision/dynamics matching examples
source_update_candidates.text: src/melee/gr/grmutecity.c in PR #2250 matched fn_801F2B58 and grMuteCity_801F2BBC, involving CollData flag checks, mpLib_GroundEnum_Unk2, p_link checks, and DynamicsDesc selection through grMc_804D69D0 fields.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl issue_comment: new 100% matches for both functions
source_update_candidates.reason: Could help future lookup for Mute City stage collision callbacks and dynamics descriptor matching, but should be curated as a source/path fact rather than globally accepted from one PR.

rejection_notes: Do not generalize the duplicated cd->x0_gobj NULL check as a style rule; it is only a matched shape in this function slice.
Do not infer semantic meanings for grMc_804D69D4, grMc_804D69D0->x8, or grMc_804D69D0->xC beyond their recovered types/uses in this diff.
Do not treat the Claude Code provenance as validation evidence; accepted evidence is limited to the diff, PR verification text, and bot report.
